name: PETMED EXPRESS INC
summary: PetMed Express, Inc. is a pet pharmacy company that sells prescription and non-prescription pet medications and other health products for dogs and cats. The company operates as an online and direct-to-consumer retailer. It participates in vendor-funded programs providing reimbursements for advertising, sales incentives, and promotional efforts linked to purchase or sales volume thresholds.

products.name: Prescription pet medications
products.description: Prescription medications for dogs and cats sold direct-to-consumer

products.name: Non-prescription pet medications
products.description: Over-the-counter health products for dogs and cats

partnerships.description: Independent registered public accounting firm serving as the Company's external auditor
